ddls:
CREATE TABLE "diseases" (
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease */,
  "disease_name" TEXT /* Name of the disease */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the disease */,
  "disease_type" TEXT /* Type of disease (e.g., fungal, bacterial, viral) */,
  "affected_crops" TEXT /* Crops affected by the disease */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., administrator, field technician, analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "field_technicians" (
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each field technician */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the field technician */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the field technician */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the field technician */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("technician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crop_histories" (
  "crop_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crop history record */,
  "crop_name" TEXT /* Name of the crop */,
  "previous_diseases" TEXT /* List of previous diseases affecting the crop */,
  "treatment_history" TEXT /* History of treatments applied to the crop */,
  "yield" INTEGER /* Yield of the crop */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crop_history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seed_treatments" (
  "seed_treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seed treatment */,
  "treatment_name" TEXT /* Name of the seed treatment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the seed treatment */,
  "active_ingredients" TEXT /* Active ingredients in the seed treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seed_treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental condition record */,
  "date" INTEGER /* Date of the condition record */,
  "precip" INTEGER /* Precipitation level */,
  "temp" INTEGER /* Temperature level */,
  "hail" INTEGER /* Hail presence */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Humidity level */,
  "wind_speed" INTEGER /* Wind speed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plant_stands" (
  "stand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plant stand record */,
  "stand_count" INTEGER /* Count of plants in the stand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the plant stand */,
  "density" INTEGER /* Density of the plant stand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disease_severity" (
  "severity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease severity record */,
  "severity_level" INTEGER /* Severity level of the disease */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the severity level */,
  "threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold value for the severity level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("severity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaf_conditions" (
  "leaf_condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaf condition record */,
  "leaves" INTEGER /* Leaf presence */,
  "leaf_halo" INTEGER /* Leaf halo presence */,
  "leaf_marg" INTEGER /* Leaf margin condition */,
  "leaf_size" INTEGER /* Leaf size */,
  "leaf_shread" INTEGER /* Leaf shredding */,
  "leaf_malf" INTEGER /* Leaf malformation */,
  "leaf_mild" INTEGER /* Leaf mildewing */,
  "chlorosis" INTEGER /* Chlorosis presence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaf_condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stem_conditions" (
  "stem_condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stem condition record */,
  "stem" INTEGER /* Stem condition */,
  "lodging" INTEGER /* Lodging presence */,
  "stem_cankers" INTEGER /* Stem cankers */,
  "canker_lesion" INTEGER /* Canker lesion presence */,
  "fruiting_bodies" INTEGER /* Fruiting bodies presence */,
  "ext_decay" INTEGER /* External decay presence */,
  "mycelium" INTEGER /* Mycelium presence */,
  "int_discolor" INTEGER /* Internal discoloration presence */,
  "sclerotia" INTEGER /* Sclerotia presence */,
  "girdling" INTEGER /* Girdling presence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stem_condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fruit_conditions" (
  "fruit_condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fruit condition record */,
  "fruit_pods" INTEGER /* Fruit pod condition */,
  "fruit_spots" INTEGER /* Fruit spot presence */,
  "seed" INTEGER /* Seed condition */,
  "mold_growth" INTEGER /* Mold growth presence */,
  "seed_discolor" INTEGER /* Seed discoloration */,
  "seed_size" INTEGER /* Seed size */,
  "shriveling" INTEGER /* Shriveling presence */,
  "rot" INTEGER /* Rot presence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fruit_condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "root_conditions" (
  "root_condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each root condition record */,
  "roots" INTEGER /* Root condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the root condition */,
  "rot" INTEGER /* Rot presence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("root_condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image record */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the disease in the image */,
  "image_data" TEXT /* Image data */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note record */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the disease in the note */,
  "note" TEXT /* Note text */,
  "date" INTEGER /* Date of the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id")
)
